hero_description: Manage King of the Beach and bracket tournaments globally. Automatic group generation, smart scheduling, and real-time rankings for athletes worldwide.
step1_desc: Set up your tournament with venue, dates, and format
step2_desc: Athletes register and join your tournament easily
step3_desc: AI creates optimal brackets and court assignments
step4_desc: Update scores and watch rankings update live
format_kotb_desc: Perfect for continuous play throughout the event. Players rotate partners dynamically, creating unpredictable matchups and fostering camaraderie. Ideal for community tournaments.
format_bracket_desc: Traditional single or double elimination format. Teams compete through structured rounds until champions are crowned. Perfect for competitive events and championships.
cta_description: Join the global footvolley community. Create and manage tournaments with ease.
